x-enumeration-literals.name: Depository Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: Place where securities are deposited, that is company, bank or institution that holds and facilitates the exchange of securities.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Place Of Registry
x-enumeration-literals.description: Location at which records of ownership are maintained for a financial instrument, and at which ownership changes must be recorded.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal Paying Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Main party appointed to distribute payment or securities on behalf of the issuer.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Registrar Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party responsible for keeping track of the owners of securities.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Determination Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that determines a parameter on which a calculation is based. For example, fixing of a reference rate.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficial Owner
x-enumeration-literals.description: Characteristics of an individual or entity that is ultimately entitled to the benefit of income and rights in a security, as opposed to a nominal or legal owner.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pledgee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Organisation used as the pledgee for the securities.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collection Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Additional party appointed to collect payment or securities on behalf of the issuer.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sponsor
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that advises a company on how to issue new shares or bonds.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lead Underwriter
x-enumeration-literals.description: Main party that is awarded the mandate by a borrower to raise money via a new issue. The lead manager guarantees the liquidity of the deal, arranges the syndication of the issue and undertakes a major underwriting and distribution commitment. Also called Lead Manager.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Remarketing Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party in charge of a remarketing event.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Safekeeping Place
x-enumeration-literals.description: Organisation used as the safekeeping place for the securities.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal Advisor
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party that provides legal advice for a fee.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Primary Place Of Deposit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies the primary place of deposit for the securities.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that safekeeps and administers assets on behalf of the owner.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriter Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that forms, together with the lead underwriter, a syndicate of co-lead managers, co-managers and underwriters in order to raise money for a borrower via a new issue.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bond Counsel
x-enumeration-literals.description: Attorney who prepares the legal opinion concerning a municipal bond issue.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal Collection Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Main party appointed to collect payment or securities on behalf of the issuer.(ISO20022)
